name: Creamy Spam Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Frozen cut broccoli, thawed and drained
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 2-quart casserole dish with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain.
4. In the casserole dish, combine macaroni, broccoli, SPAM, and red bell pepper.
5. In a small saucepan, stir together milk, cornstarch, and pepper until cornstarch is dissolved.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly, until thickened.
7. Reduce heat to low and add cheese; stir until melted.
8. Stir the sauce into the SPAM mixture.
9. Sprinkle bread crumbs and margarine over the top of the casserole.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
